name: Rejuvant alpha-ketoglutarate
summary: Rejuvant alpha-ketoglutarate is normalized for a retrospective DNA-methylation age cohort report.
mechanism_summary: Represents a branded alpha-ketoglutarate supplement exposure intended to modulate metabolism and methylation-age biomarkers.

open_questions: Whether the linked evidence generalizes beyond the specific population, model, tissue, or disease context already recorded in the public finding. Linked context: Rejuvant DNA-methylation age retrospective cohort; Rejuvant retrospective cohort reported lower DNA-methylation age.
Whether mechanism-specific effects can be separated from combination, product, delivery, or study-design confounding.
Whether future studies can connect the observed biomarker, functional, or model-organism signal to durable aging-relevant outcomes.
